title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Tama, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Kiku, Unknown person #15, Luffy as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Geh! Her fever's got- ten worse again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold on! We'll get you to a doctor soon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the enemy has both the food and the water, then that's just more convenient for me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Leave everything on your per- son here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! someone just ran in from the side!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Seems pretty strong! Is he a Samurai?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know not who you might be, but... Thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah. Don't worry. I'm... er, I ART after...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Oi, dog! Stop for a sec!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yes, but... how shall I thank you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Whoa It's Been A WH- HASH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It definitely hath been a long time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah! We got separated, but... I bet they're fine!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Is that meat you have there?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's fish and animals aplenty in these parts! Hunt as much as you want, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: No shortage of food, that's for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nah, you've gotta be careful. The water around here is poisoned or something.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: makes this meat and the fish poisonous, too. 'S what I heard.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see. So that's why my stomach's been hurting.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A Buncha stuff happened and now I gotta take her to see a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Should you be standing around eat- ing at a time like this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You, there. Are you the nationally wanted Ronin, Zorojiro? And is that your crewmember?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was just on my way to Kuri Beach. I take it you're the culprit of what happened there today, no?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah. He's joined under Kaido, apparently.

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 51 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
